KeysToEntries.CraftingTable.Description: A simple crafting station equipped with an array of primitive tools. It is used to craft equipment and other important resources.
KeysToEntries.PotteryWheel.Description: Used for fashioning clay items. Bowls, pots, and jewellery moulds can be crafted at this station and then fired in a furnace.
KeysToEntries.RuneAltar.Description: Used for crafting Runes, the magical stones needed to cast magic.
KeysToEntries.BrewingCauldron.Description: This cauldron is used to brew potions.
KeysToEntries.Kiln.Description: A heated kiln, used to fire pottery.
KeysToEntries.Grindstone.Description: This tool can crush stone, bones, and other things, into fine dust.
KeysToEntries.Loom.Description: The device processes threads into textiles and cloth.
KeysToEntries.Furnace.Description: By burning charcoal to create a blazing hot flame, the furnace is able to fire clay, and smelt ores into metal bars.
KeysToEntries.SpinningWheel.Description: A spinning wheel can spin fibres such as flax or fleece into threads for crafting with.
KeysToEntries.Tannery.Description: A rack that slowly processes animal hide into leather.
KeysToEntries.LoomHarness.Description: A loom improvement. The loom harness grants an additional slot to the loom, allowing the loom to weave more complex textiles.
KeysToEntries.TannersKit.Description: A tannery improvement. The tanner's kit adds another build slot to the tanning station, allowing you to create more complex materials.
KeysToEntries.CookingRange.Description: A workstation dedicated to cooking food. A cooking range can be used to cook hearty meals as well as individual raw foods.
KeysToEntries.CookingPot.Description: A sturdy pot over a campfire that can be used to combine ingredients to make better meals and infuse water with berries or other ingredients.
KeysToEntries.Campfire.Description: A nice hot fire on which to cook food or purify dirty water.
KeysToEntries.Grill.Description: A much improved home cooking fire with no need for fuel
KeysToEntries.AdvancedFurnace.Description: The blast furnace uses intense heat to smelt high tier metal ores into ingots.
KeysToEntries.SmithAnvil.Description: A Blacksmith's Anvil. Required for working with metals.
KeysToEntries.JewelersBench.Description: Used to craft magical items from precious metals and gems.
KeysToEntries.Runecrafting.Title: Runecrafting
KeysToEntries.Runecrafting.Description.AttunementPhase: Find an attunement frequency to infuse the runes with magical energy. Higher attunement levels grant additional bonus runes.
KeysToEntries.Runecrafting.Description.InfusionPhase: As the attuned rune fills with power, mend it's cracks to contain the magic within and safeguard you bonus runes.
